seoTitle: Retro vs Rewan — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Retro and Rewan. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Retro and Rewan.
heading: Retro vs Rewan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Retro, Queensland and Rewan, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rewan has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Retro (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Retro or Rewan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Retro has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Rewan scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Retro scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Rewan scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Retro or Rewan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rewan has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
